title: Opening for Software Engineer at Ninjacart

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Ninjacart
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
